name: Louis Guillaume
notes:
I am a brand new business owner who is working on building my while work my normal w2 job. looking to see what options are available to help me kick start to start bringing in some revenue. the goal is to be able to generate 1.5X my w2 income so I can move on to being full time committed to my business,

2. Tools and techniques for writing government bid contract proposals/responses
